languages.text: "Старики рассказывали, что когда у нас еще была связь, рядом с погонщицами она глохла. Как же они говорили... Она усыпляет машинных духов, вот!"

traits.locale_text: "Старики рассказывали, что когда у нас еще была связь, рядом с погонщицами она глохла. Как же они говорили... Машинные духи боятся ее, вот!"
traits.speaker: CaptainVedkaDunavski

languages.text: "Our elders told us that, back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. What was it they said...? It 'puts the machine spirits to sleep.' That's it!"
languages.original_text: "Старики рассказывали, что когда у нас еще была связь, рядом с погонщицами она глохла. Как же они говорили... Она усыпляет машинных духов, вот!"

traits.locale_text: "Our elders told us that, back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. What was it they said... She 'puts the machine spirits to sleep,' that's it!"

"The old-timers used to say that back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. How did they put it... The machine spirits are afraid of her, that's it!"
"Our elders told us that, back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. What was it they said...? She 'puts the machine spirits to sleep.' That's it!"

"The old-timers used to say that, back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. How did they put it... The machine spirits are afraid of her, that's it!"
"Our elders told us that, back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. What was it they said... She 'puts the machine spirits to sleep,' that's it!"
"Our elders told us that, back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. What was it they said...? She 'puts the machine spirits to sleep.' That's it!"
"Our elders told us that, back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. What was it they said...? It 'puts the machine spirits to sleep.' That's it!"

languages.text: "Als wir noch kommunizieren konnten, haben die Alten immer gesagt, alle Kanäle wären tot, wenn Treiber in der Nähe sind. Was sagten sie immer ...? Sie 'schicken die Maschinengeister schlafen'. Das ist es!"
languages.original_text: "Our elders told us that, back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. What was it they said...? She 'puts the machine spirits to sleep.' That's it!"

traits.locale_text: "Als wir noch kommunizieren konnten, haben die Alten immer gesagt, alle Kanäle wären tot, wenn Treiber in der Nähe sind. Was sagten sie immer ...? Sie 'schicken die Maschinengeister schlafen'. Das ist es!"

languages.text: « À en croire la vieille garde, du temps où les communications fonctionnaient encore, les canaux se brouillaient chaque fois des Chasseurs venaient rôder dans les parages. Comment disaient-ils, déjà... Ah, oui ! Ces créatures font dormir les esprits de la machine, paraît-il ! »
languages.original_text: "Our elders told us that, back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. What was it they said...? She 'puts the machine spirits to sleep.' That's it!"

traits.locale_text: « À en croire la vieille garde, du temps où les communications fonctionnaient encore, les canaux se brouillaient chaque fois des Chasseurs venaient rôder dans les parages. Comment disaient-ils, déjà... Ah, oui ! Ces créatures font dormir les esprits de la machine, paraît-il ! »

languages.text: «Nuestros ancianos dicen que, cuando teníamos comunicaciones, los canales callaban cuando había un Pastor cerca. ¿Cómo lo decían?... "Adormece a los espíritus máquina", ¡eso era!».
languages.original_text: "Our elders told us that, back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. What was it they said...? She 'puts the machine spirits to sleep.' That's it!"

traits.locale_text: «Nuestros ancianos dicen que, cuando teníamos comunicaciones, los canales callaban cuando había un Pastor cerca. ¿Cómo lo decían?... "Adormece a los espíritus máquina", ¡eso era!».

languages.text: "İhtiyarlarımız, iletişim kurabildiğimiz çağlarda Çoban ne zaman yaklaşsa kanalların kesildiğini söylerdi. Hatta şey derlerdi... 'Onu görünce makine ruhları uykuya dalarmış.' Böyle derlerdi!"
languages.original_text: "Our elders told us that, back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. What was it they said...? She 'puts the machine spirits to sleep.' That's it!"

traits.locale_text: "İhtiyarlarımız, iletişim kurabildiğimiz çağlarda Çoban ne zaman yaklaşsa kanalların kesildiğini söylerdi. Hatta şey derlerdi... 'Onu görünce makine ruhları uykuya dalarmış.' Böyle derlerdi!"

languages.text: “老人们曾说过，当年我们还有通讯的时候，只要拒生花一靠近，频道就会全部失灵。他们怎么说来着……？她会‘让机魂陷入沉睡’。对，就是这话！”
languages.original_text: "Our elders told us that, back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. What was it they said...? She 'puts the machine spirits to sleep.' That's it!"

traits.locale_text: “老人们曾说过，当年我们还有通讯的时候，只要拒生花一靠近，频道就会全部失灵。他们怎么说来着……？她会‘让机魂陷入沉睡’。对，就是这话！”

languages.text: 「昔、通信がまだあった頃、ドルーバーが近くにいると、通信が途絶えていた。何と言っていたか…『機械の霊を眠らせる』そうだった！」
languages.original_text: "Our elders told us that, back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. What was it they said...? She 'puts the machine spirits to sleep.' That's it!"

traits.locale_text: 「昔、通信がまだあった頃、ドルーバーが近くにいると、通信が途絶えていた。何と言っていたか…『機械の霊を眠らせる』そうだった！」
